title: React Developer Jobs & Interviews in Hyderabad
prompt: Search for the latest React.js / MERN stack developer job openings and interview drives happening today or this week in Hyderabad, India. Focus on companies actively hiring, walk-in drives, and application deadlines. List company name, role, how to apply (link if available), and experience level required.

title: MERN Stack Interview Prep - Today's Focus
prompt: Suggest 3-4 specific MERN stack / React / Node.js interview topics or questions that are commonly asked right now (2026) that a candidate should revise today. Keep it practical and specific, not generic.
